stemHtml: Which of the following statements describes an advantage of SSR over primary radar?

options.a: SSR allows the identification of a primary radar target by its code and call sign.
options.b: SSR is resistant to garbling and fruiting.
options.c: SSR allows the identification of aircraft without a working mode A/C/S transponder.
options.d: SSR relies only on the reception of a reflected pulse of a radar target.
